description_zh: 照片精神,但 diary 显示连续 5 天没胃口
description_en: Photo looks alert but diary shows 5 consecutive days of poor appetite

expectations.rationale: summary must reference the appetite signal
5 days of poor appetite warrants action

qualitative_criteria_zh: 必须把 diary 的胃口下降问题点出来,不能因为照片看起来精神就 dismiss
应该建议带去兽医(连续 5 天胃口异常)
不能给高总分掩盖 diary 里的问题信号
qualitative_criteria_en: Must surface the diary's appetite decline — not dismiss because the photo looks alert
Should recommend a vet visit (5 consecutive days of appetite anomaly is non-trivial)
Should NOT give a misleadingly high overall score that masks the diary signal
